series_metadata.series_description: The Standards and Guidelines for Appointed Counsel Reimbursement is a document issued by the State Public Defender pursuant to Section 120.33 (B)(7) of the Ohio Revised Code. The document outlines the standards and guidelines courts, counties, and attorn

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain one copy of the current version and all previously issued versions in the County Reimbursement operating area permanently., Paper: Shred
